title: cacalia octantha
intro: Cacalia octantha, also known as the Eight-angled Cacalia, is a plant species in the family Campanulaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving digestive health. The herbal preparations of Cacalia octantha include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent.
